speakers.name: María Encinar
speakers.title: AWS User Group Program - Global Lead
speakers.talk_title: Keynote Speaker
speakers.abstract:
I lead the developer community team at PagoNxt/Banco Santander, and I worked as community specialist at Google, where I took care of developer communities in Central and Eastern Europe. 

I love the intersection of technology and communities where I can contribute to building environments where people can learn, collaborate and grow.

speakers.name: Ridhima Kapoor
speakers.title: Sr. Community Manager
speakers.talk_title: Welcome Speaker
speakers.abstract:
I'm a tech marketer with over 13 years of work experience, across startups, mid size brands and large organizations. I am currently working as a Sr. Community Manager at Amazon Web Services. In this role, I'm building communities for developers across India and South Asia, and creating developer programs for brand awareness for the AWS services. Before joining AWS, I helped app and game developers to scale their businesses on Google Play, Google Chrome, and Android. 

Having worked with both global brands and start-ups across the tech industry, I can perfectly blend the traditional marketing methods and new digital initiatives for a holistic 360-degree marketing landscape. I am a go getter who is always hungry for a new challenge. A multitasker who can thrive both as a team player or in a self-starter, fast-paced and changing environment.

I am passionate about digitization of different aspects of business like consumer & market insights, product innovations, brand building, customer acquisitions, building communities & word of mouth through brand advocates. 

Key Skills: 
Hard Skills 
Developer Marketing, Marketing Strategy, Data Analytics, B2B Marketing, B2C Marketing, Content Marketing, Event Management, Project Management, Vendor Management, User Acquisition, App Store Optimization, Brand Partnerships and eSports Marketing. 

Soft Skills
Communication Skills, Work Ethics, Self- motivated, Self- disciplined, Creative, Emotional Intelligence, Team Work, Problem Solving and Adaptability.
